_comment: Reviewed-through versions of the OWASP frameworks cfgaudit's mappings target. The check-framework-versions workflow alerts (opens an issue) when upstream moves past these. After reviewing a mapping against a newer version, bump the value here. Mappings live in: each rule doc's '**OWASP:**' (LLM Top 10) and '**OWASP MCP:**' (MCP Top 10) header lines, the README OWASP-MCP mapping table, and docs/aisvs-mapping.md (AISVS).
